title: ononis spinosa subsp. caduca
intro: Ononis spinosa subsp. caduca, also known as the Spiny Restharrow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ononis spinosa subsp. caduca include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
